allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Ports cleared")
